TABLE.NAME: playercross
TABLE.COMMENT: Each record is one PlayerCross activity instance

FIELD.NAME: course
FIELD.COMMENT: Course this activity belongs to

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Activity name

FIELD.NAME: intro
FIELD.COMMENT: Activity description

FIELD.NAME: sources
FIELD.COMMENT: Bitmask for enabled clue-word sources: 1=manual, 2=glossary. AI words are not gated by this bitmask; they are always saved as pending regardless of its value

FIELD.NAME: glossaryid
FIELD.COMMENT: Glossary to sync words from; 0 means all glossaries in the course

FIELD.NAME: stopwords
FIELD.COMMENT: Comma-separated words to ignore when splitting multi-word glossary concepts

FIELD.NAME: min_length
FIELD.COMMENT: Minimum accepted length for clue words

FIELD.NAME: max_length
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum accepted length for clue words

FIELD.NAME: theme_min_length
FIELD.COMMENT: Minimum length for a word to be eligible as the mystery phrase

FIELD.NAME: theme_max_length
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum length for a word to be eligible as the mystery phrase, 0 means unlimited

FIELD.NAME: num_clues
FIELD.COMMENT: Clues per round, 3-10

FIELD.NAME: reveal_uncovered_slots
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether mystery-phrase letters not covered by any selected clue are revealed from the start of the round

FIELD.NAME: win_condition
FIELD.COMMENT: How a round can be won: 1=every clue plus the mystery phrase, 2=the mystery phrase alone

FIELD.NAME: max_attempts_per_clue
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum guesses per clue, 0 means unlimited

FIELD.NAME: timer_seconds
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional timer in seconds for the whole round; null/0 means disabled

FIELD.NAME: show_ranking
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether ranking is shown to students

FIELD.NAME: wordmode
FIELD.COMMENT: Theme word selection mode: 1=random per round, 2=shared across students by round number

FIELD.NAME: max_rounds
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum rounds per user, 0 means unlimited

FIELD.NAME: cooldown_seconds
FIELD.COMMENT: Cooldown between rounds in seconds, 0 means disabled

FIELD.NAME: completionrounds
FIELD.COMMENT: Required completed rounds for custom completion rule

FIELD.NAME: grade
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum grade value

FIELD.NAME: gradepass
FIELD.COMMENT: Minimum passing grade

FIELD.NAME: grademethod
FIELD.COMMENT: Grade aggregation: 1=highest, 2=average, 3=first, 4=last, 5=average over all required rounds

FIELD.NAME: hud_round_cost_item
FIELD.COMMENT: block_playerhud_items.id required to start a round; 0 = disabled

FIELD.NAME: hud_round_cost_qty
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of items consumed to start a round

FIELD.NAME: hud_hint_cost_item
FIELD.COMMENT: block_playerhud_items.id required to reveal a clue's hint; 0 = disabled

FIELD.NAME: hud_hint_cost_qty
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of items consumed to reveal a clue's hint

FIELD.NAME: hud_win_reward_item
FIELD.COMMENT: block_playerhud_items.id granted for winning a round; 0 = disabled

FIELD.NAME: hud_win_reward_qty
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of items granted for winning a round

TABLE.NAME: playercross_words
TABLE.COMMENT: Approved and pending words available as theme/clue candidates

FIELD.NAME: word
FIELD.COMMENT: Game word

FIELD.NAME: concept
FIELD.COMMENT: Original concept name; set when word is extracted from a multi-word glossary entry

FIELD.NAME: hint
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional hint

FIELD.NAME: source
FIELD.COMMENT: Word source: manual, glossary or ai

FIELD.NAME: glossaryid
FIELD.COMMENT: ID of the glossary this word was imported from; 0 for manual/ai words

TABLE.NAME: playercross_attempts
TABLE.COMMENT: Append-only log of one row per completed round

FIELD.NAME: themewordid
FIELD.COMMENT: playercross_words.id used as the mystery phrase in this round

FIELD.NAME: finalguessed
FIELD.COMMENT: Round ended by a correct direct guess of the mystery phrase
